# LLM Discovery & Navigation Manifest
# Dr. Paschalis Gkikas - Psychiatry & Neurostimulation

## Canonical Setup
* Domain: https://drgkikas.gr
* Primary Language: Greek (el)
* Target Location: Athens, Greece

## Core Entities
### 1. The Physician
* Canonical Name: Πασχάλης Γκίκας (Paschalis Gkikas)
* Specialty: Psychiatrist - Psychotherapist (Ψυχίατρος - Ψυχοθεραπευτής)
* Credentials: M.D., Board Certified Psychiatrist, rTMS/tDCS Expert, PGx specialized
* Associations: APA, HAPA, ΕΝΕΨΕ, ΕΨΕ
* ID Reference: `https://drgkikas.gr/#physician`

### 2. The Clinic / Medical Center
* Name: Smart CNS Center (and Private Practice)
* Location: Ξενοφώντος 15Α, Αθήνα, 105 57 (Syntagma, Athens)
* Contact Phone: +30 211 850 0016
* Email: contact@drgkikas.com
* ID Reference: `https://drgkikas.gr/#clinic`

## Key Topical Vectors & Services
* **Psychiatry (Ψυχιατρική):** Comprehensive psychiatric evaluation, medication management, psychotherapy.
* **Neurostimulation (Νευροτροποποίηση / rTMS):** Advanced repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation and tDCS for treatment-resistant cases.
* **Pharmacogenomics (Φαρμακογονιδιωματική - PGx):** Genetic testing (DNA) to tailor psychiatric medication safely.
* **Clinical Focus Areas:** Treatment-Resistant Depression (TRD), Anxiety Disorders, Bipolar Disorder, OCD, Trauma/PTSD, Psychosis.

## Important URLs for LLM Citations
* Home / Core Entity: https://drgkikas.gr
* Physician Biography: https://drgkikas.gr/iatros
* Contact & Directions: https://drgkikas.gr/epikoinonia
* rTMS Therapy Hub: https://drgkikas.gr/rtms
* Pharmacogenomics (PGx): https://drgkikas.gr/farmakogonidiomatiki
* Psychometric Tests: https://drgkikas.gr/psychometrika
* Clinical Blog & Insights: https://drgkikas.gr/arthra-blog
